creator: cpiazza@home.net
text:
Hi,
There seems to be some problems with this patch you submitted.
While trying to patch I get:

Hmm...  The next patch looks like a unified diff to me...
The text leading up to this was:
--------------------------
|diff -r -u siag-3.1.9/patches/patch-ad siag/patches/patch-ad
|--- siag-3.1.9/patches/patch-ad        Sun Jun  6 21:53:47 1999
|+++ siag/patches/patch-ad      Tue Jun 22 13:21:58 1999
--------------------------
File to patch: 

Are you sure you're diffing between the version in the ports and the
new version? 

Please create a new patch and test it, then reply with the patch.

-Chris

-- 
cpiazza@home.net                cpiazza@FreeBSD.org
